name: agent-bitcoin-wallet
description: Sovereign Bitcoin Agent — a trustless, TEE-hardened hub for autonomous Bitcoin operations. Supports wallet management, Taproot transactions, governance policy, and Runes minting. Built on BIP-341/BIP-86 Schnorr signatures with Simplicity formal verification.

skills.name: bitcoin-wallet
skills.description: Read-only wallet state: Taproot address, live UTXO balance, and UTXOracle BTC price. Use before any operation that requires knowing available funds.

skills.name: bitcoin-transactions
skills.description: Send Bitcoin: single payments, batched multi-output transfers (up to 10), and OP_RETURN message etching. Includes the fee safety trap and governance escalation path.

skills.name: bitcoin-governance
skills.description: Inspect and upgrade the 3-leaf Taproot spending policy (allowance, whale threshold, recovery). Policy upgrades require hardware wallet co-signature via QR code PSBT.

skills.name: runes-minting
skills.description: Full Rune lifecycle: Etch new Runes (closed premine or open-mint with Terms), and Mint tokens from existing open-mint Runes by RuneId. Live-proven on Mutinynet. No ord CLI required.

sovereign-bitcoin.description: MCP bridge exposing the Sovereign Bitcoin Agent enclave. Requires the Rust enclave (port 7777) and Python gateway (port 8000) to be running.

tools.name: get_my_bitcoin_address
tools.description: Returns the sovereign Taproot (P2TR) address managed by the TEE enclave.

tools.name: check_my_balance
tools.description: Fetches the live UTXO balance in satoshis from the Mutinynet/Signet network.

tools.name: get_bitcoin_price
tools.description: Returns the current BTC price from the UTXOracle L1 thermodynamic proxy.

tools.name: get_governance_policy
tools.description: Returns the current Taproot governance policy: daily allowance, whale threshold, recovery path.

tools.name: compose_transaction
tools.description: Constructs, signs, and broadcasts a Bitcoin transaction. Supports multi-output batching and OP_RETURN message etching. Enforces a 50 sat/vB fee safety trap.

tools.name: propose_policy_update
tools.description: Generates a governance QR code (PSBT) for the user to authorize a spending limit upgrade via hardware wallet.

tools.name: mint_rune
tools.description: Full Rune lifecycle via TEE enclave. ETCH: deploy a new Rune (closed premine or open-mint with Terms) using rune_name. MINT: claim tokens from an existing open-mint Rune using rune_id (block:tx format). Runestone built with the ordinals crate — no ord CLI. Live-proven on Mutinynet (OP•RETURN•WAR•II, block 3007261).

layers.name: enclave-signer
layers.description: TEE-hardened signing kernel. BIP-86 Taproot, BIP-341 Schnorr, Simplicity VM, Runes Runestone builder.

layers.name: agent-gateway
layers.description: FastAPI LLM reasoning loop. Dual-provider (Claude + Ollama), tool dispatch, Telegram bot.

layers.name: mcp-bridge
layers.description: FastMCP server exposing wallet tools to Claude Desktop / Claude Code over the MCP protocol.

contracts.description: Simplicity contract enforcing daily spending allowance. Excludes change outputs and OP_RETURN from spend accounting.
Simplicity contract for BIP-340 authorized policy state transitions.
